description: CompositionBlue sleeveless kurta with white and green floral print, made of cotton fabric, has a round slit neckline and a vented hemFitRegularWash careHand wash separately in cold water using mild detergentDry in shadeDo not soakfabindia specialises in natural, craft-based contemporary pieces, while also providing rural craft persons a platform to use traditional dyeing and fabric printing techniques. Capturing the essence of Indian roots, crafted with a focus on the traditional, this kurta sets the tone for an all-new ethnic trend. Wear this with denims, cotton pants or leggings. Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33”
